messages.content: 润色如下内容：Ms. FENG manifested effective communication skills during her work. From my observation, she plays a pivotal role in Acting as a liaison between the employees and upper management when it comes to financial and administrative issues.

Ms. FENG consistently demonstrated excellent communication skills throughout her work. Based on my observations, she possesses a remarkable ability to serve as a key intermediary between employees and upper management, particularly in matters pertaining to finance and administration.
中译英：保证我们机构的利益最大化
Maximizing the interests of our organization is guaranteed.
润色如下内容：Maximizing the interests of our organization is guaranteed.
We ensure that the interests of our organization are maximized.
中译英: 我非常欣赏她在内部管理和外部谈判所展现的沟通技巧。
I highly appreciate her communication skills demonstrated in internal management and external negotiations.
润色如下内容：I highly appreciate her communication skills demonstrated in internal management and external negotiations.
I deeply value her exceptional communication skills that she displays not only in internal management but also in external negotiations.
中译英：收集并整理不同行业与品牌出海的相关资料和案例。参与商业建议书的撰写。绘制消费者行为链路和会员体系。参与创想三维品牌年度战略体系核心内容规划的制作。对定量问卷收集结果进行交叉分析，绘制图表。参与面向客户的访谈与报告，撰写会议纪要。梳理品牌核心价值体系细分概念，绘制PPT。

Gathering and organizing relevant information and case studies on different industries and brands entering foreign markets. Participating in the writing of business proposals. Creating consumer behavior pathways and membership systems. Contributing to the development of core strategic content for the annual planning of the Imagine 3D brand. Conducting cross-analysis of quantitative survey results and creating charts and graphs. Participating in customer interviews and report writing, as well as drafting meeting minutes. Organizing and refining concepts related to the brand's core value system and creating PowerPoint presentations.

润色如下内容：Gathering and organizing relevant information and case studies on different industries and brands entering foreign markets. Participating in the writing of business proposals. Creating consumer behavior pathways and membership systems. Contributing to the development of core strategic content for the annual planning of the Imagine 3D brand. Conducting cross-analysis of quantitative survey results and creating charts and graphs. Participating in customer interviews and report writing, as well as drafting meeting minutes. Organizing and refining concepts related to the brand’s core value system and creating PowerPoint presentations.

I am responsible for collecting and organizing pertinent information and case studies on various industries and brands expanding into international markets. Additionally, I contribute to the development of business proposals and play a role in creating consumer behavior pathways and membership systems. I am actively involved in shaping the core strategic content for the annual planning of the Imagine 3D brand. This includes conducting cross-analysis of quantitative survey findings and presenting them through visually-engaging charts and graphs. I am also engaged in conducting customer interviews, writing reports, and preparing concise meeting minutes. Lastly, I am involved in organizing and refining concepts related to the brand's core value system, and creating compelling PowerPoint presentations.
中译英：她刚到岗就迅速收集并整理了多个行业和品牌报告信息，包括：3D打印机行业，智能家电行业，SAAS行业，海洋石油行业，牙膏行业。品牌十余个包括YOTTOY, DYSON等

Upon her arrival, she quickly gathered and organized multiple industry and brand reports, including but not limited to the 3D printing industry, smart home appliances industry, SAAS industry, offshore petroleum industry, and toothpaste industry. She covered over ten brands, including YOTTOY and DYSON.

润色如下内容：Upon her arrival, she quickly gathered and organized multiple industry and brand reports, including but not limited to the 3D printing industry, smart home appliances industry, SAAS industry, offshore petroleum industry, and toothpaste industry. She covered over ten brands, including YOTTOY and DYSON.

Upon her arrival, she swiftly collected and meticulously organized a wide range of industry and brand reports, including but not limited to the 3D printing, smart home appliances, SAAS, offshore petroleum, and toothpaste industries. She thoroughly covered over ten prominent brands, such as YOTTOY and DYSON.
中译英：她对20个定量问卷收集结果进行交叉分析，绘制了41个图表，aiming to help 创想三维明确自身的品牌优势和了解用户最关心的3D打印机价值，最终提炼出创想三维对外的最核心的品牌价值。参与创想三维品牌年度战略体系核心内容规划的制作：1.翻译和整合PPT  2.绘制数智时代的五种品牌原型 3. 收集并整理3D打印行业国内外部分优秀企业的品牌定位及战略定位。

She performed cross-analysis on the results of 20 quantitative surveys and created 41 charts and graphs, aiming to help Imagine 3D clarify its brand advantages and understand the most valued aspects of 3D printing from the user's perspective. As a result, the core brand values for Imagine 3D were refined. She also participated in the development of the core content for the annual strategic framework of Imagine 3D, which involved tasks such as translating and consolidating PowerPoint presentations, creating prototypes of five brand archetypes for the digital era, and gathering and organizing brand positioning and strategic positioning information for outstanding domestic and international companies in the 3D printing industry.

润色如下内容：She performed cross-analysis on the results of 20 quantitative surveys and created 41 charts and graphs, aiming to help Imagine 3D clarify its brand advantages and understand the most valued aspects of 3D printing from the user’s perspective. As a result, the core brand values for Imagine 3D were refined. She also participated in the development of the core content for the annual strategic framework of Imagine 3D, which involved tasks such as translating and consolidating PowerPoint presentations, creating prototypes of five brand archetypes for the digital era, and gathering and organizing brand positioning and strategic positioning information for outstanding domestic and international companies in the 3D printing industry.

With great dedication, she meticulously performed cross-analysis on the findings of 20 quantitative surveys and skillfully presented the results through 41 charts and graphs. The objective was to enable Imagine 3D to gain clarity on its brand advantages and understand the most valued aspects of 3D printing from the user's perspective. This process ultimately led to the refinement of the core brand values for Imagine 3D. Moreover, she actively contributed to the development of the annual strategic framework for Imagine 3D. This entailed tasks such as proficiently translating and consolidating PowerPoint presentations, creating prototypes of five brand archetypes relevant to the digital era, and effectively gathering and organizing pertinent information concerning brand positioning and strategic approaches adopted by exceptional domestic and international enterprises in the 3D printing industry.
中译英：参与龙腾出行Alpha2.0 年度顾问战略决策研讨会报告的制作，
Participated in the production of the annual consultant strategic decision-making seminar report for Longteng Rides Alpha2.0.
中译英：她负责了携程会员体系的绘制。2.SAAS的不同发展时期及特点 3. SAAS企业出海的swot分析。她同时也参与了这次面向客户的讨论会，主要工作是负责记录会议和写会议纪要。在讨论会结束后，也针对客户提出的修改意见和参与和项目组一起的商讨和修改。

She was responsible for creating the membership system for Ctrip. She also participated in the analysis of different development stages and characteristics of SAAS and conducted SWOT analysis for SAAS companies expanding abroad. She actively contributed to the customer-focused discussion, where her main responsibilities included documenting the meeting and writing meeting minutes. Following the conclusion of the discussion, she collaborated with the project team to discuss and make necessary modifications based on the client's suggested revisions.

润色如下内容：She was responsible for creating the membership system for Ctrip. She also participated in the analysis of different development stages and characteristics of SAAS and conducted SWOT analysis for SAAS companies expanding abroad. She actively contributed to the customer-focused discussion, where her main responsibilities included documenting the meeting and writing meeting minutes. Following the conclusion of the discussion, she collaborated with the project team to discuss and make necessary modifications based on the client’s suggested revisions.

She assumed responsibility for designing and implementing the membership system for Ctrip. Additionally, she actively engaged in analyzing the various stages of development and distinguishing features of SAAS, as well as conducting SWOT analysis for SAAS companies venturing into international markets. Furthermore, she actively participated in customer-focused discussions, primarily focusing on documenting the meeting proceedings and compiling concise meeting minutes. After the discussion, she collaborated with the project team to thoroughly consider and incorporate the client's suggested modifications and recommendations.
